titleStmt.title: SII 25.205: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 205. (A.R. No. 205 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the verandah of the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This inscription may be assigned to c. 13th century on palaeographical grounds.

It records an order (ōlai) issued by an officer of the king Paiyyuḻāṉ Periyāṉ Aḻagiyaperumāḷ alias Śōḻagaṅgaṉ to the tāṉattār of the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār granting the lands from his kāṇi-paṟṟu at Nambaṉkuṟuchchi, a hamlet of Śāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśanichcharuruppēdimaṅgalam as iṟaiyili, for the purpose of food-offerings, tirumēṟppūchchu, tiruchchāndu, tiruppaḷitāmam and tiruviḷakkeṇṇai to the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār on the days of festivals such as tirukkāppunāḷ, tiruveḻuchchi and tiruaraippuṟam instituted by him in the month of Vaikāśi. A number of signatories like mudal-kaṇakk-uḍaiyāṉ Tirujñānasambanda-vēḷāṉ, etc., have attested this document.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī paiyyūḻāṉ periyāṉ Aḻakiya perumāḷāṉa coḻakaṅkaḷ Olai Uṭaiyār tiruvucā
ttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkoyil tāṉattār kaṇṭu Innāyaṉār koyil tiruvaikācit tirunāḷil nāṉ
eḻuntaruḷivittu varukiṟa tirukkāppu nāḷum tiruveḻucciyum tiruaraippuṟamum Eḻuntaruḷivittu varukaiyil Iṉṉāḷ
kaḷil Amutupaṭikkum kaṟiyamutuḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉattukkum tirumeṟppūccut tiruccāntuḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum tiruppaḷittā
mam tiruviḷakkeṇṇaikkum Uṭalāka Eṉkāṇiyāṉa cāttāṉamāṉa keraḷakulācaniccaruppetimaṅkalattu piṭākai nampaṉ
kuṟucciyil viṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkkellai Āṇṭāṉoṭaikku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai Innāyaṉār tevatāṉat
tukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai kāṇipaṟṟil paruvarampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Āṇṭāṉoṭaiyi niṉṟum meṟku
nokki pokiṟa Oḻukkaikku teṟkkum Āṉa Innāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa centivayakkal Eṉṟu perkūvapaṭṭa rūpāy ci
Irācakempiraveḷān kāṇippaṟṟukku teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa rūpāy ciṉṉamum Āka rūpāyma8 ciṉṉamum mikuti kuṟaivu
uḷppaṭṭa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrācentira coḻa tevaṟkuyāṇṭu pattāvatiṉ netirāmāṇṭu mutal tantu In
nilam Ivvāṇṭu mutal kaikkoṇṭu Innilattāl Uṭal Ittirunāḷ kaḷukku Uṭalāka kaikkoṇṭu tirunāmattu kāṇi
yum Iṟaiyiliyumāka cantirātittavarai Aṉupavikkavum Ittālvanta tarappaṭi maṭakku Eṉkāṇi paṟṟu tukaiyaṉenaṭṭi kaṭamai
kuṭimai Iṟuttuk kuṭukka kaṭaveṉākavum Icolvittu ppaṭiye Iṉṉāḷ mutalumaṟakka koṇṭu tirunāmattu kāṇiyum Iṟai
yiliyumāka Aṉupavippate Innilam cantirātittavarai Aṉupavippatāka cempilum kallilumāka veṭṭikoḷḷap paṇṇavate
ippaṭikku Ivai paiyuḻaiyān periyāṉ Aḻakiya perumāṉāṉa coḻakaṅkaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟu Ivai mutalk kaṇakku tirunāṉacampanta veḷāṉ
Digital edition of SII 25.205 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
